name: ForgeKit Dev Environment
postStartCommand: echo '' && echo 'ForgeKit dev environment ready.' && echo '' && echo 'Available commands:' && echo '  node packages/cli/dist/index.js list          -- list all templates' && echo '  node packages/cli/dist/index.js new <name>   -- scaffold a new project' && echo '  npm test --workspace=packages/cli             -- run CLI tests' && echo '  npm run build --workspace=packages/cli        -- rebuild CLI' && echo ''
